Our Products

Two systems. One mission.

Each product is built on proprietary algorithms, verified performance data, and years of market expertise. Together, they cover every angle of football betting intelligence.

ZI CORNER PRO
Real-Time Corner Momentum Analysis
  • 4 precision windows — 26', 55', 65', 77'
  • 11-criteria confidence score (0–10)
  • Proprietary pressure index formula
  • 10-layer filter cascade — zero noise
  • Automatic WIN/LOSS follow-up
  • Verified performance dashboard
Explore ZI Corner Pro →
NEW
GOAL SHARP ELITE
Pre-Live & Live Goal Intelligence
  • Pre-live goal predictions with edge
  • Live goal momentum alerts
  • Value identification across top leagues
  • Verified performance tracking
  • Daily summaries and statistics
  • Delivered directly to Telegram
Explore Goal Sharp →
Elite Pack — Exclusive

Beyond the Algorithm

The human edge that no bot can replicate.

Real setup. Real analysis. Real edge.

Personal Tips by the Creator

The Elite Pack includes personal tips from an experienced trader watching live streams — combining real-time visual analysis with years of corner and goal market expertise. These are human decisions, not automated signals. Exclusive to Elite Pack subscribers only.
